CustomField.description: Date field that stamps when 'Premium Target - Updated Definition' field changed from true to false. (When the school went from target to non-target). Updated by flow "CF - Active Student Enrollment Percent Met Date"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Date reflects when the 'Premium Target - Updated Definition' field changed from true to false. (When the school went from target to non-target)
CustomField.label: Premium Target to Non-Target Date Stamp
